meanings.definition: fail to perceive or to catch with the senses or the mind
examples: We lost part of what he said

meanings.definition: feel or suffer from the lack of
fail to attend an event or activity
examples: He missed school for a week
How could I miss that typo?
The workers on the conveyor belt miss one out of ten

meanings.definition: fail to reach or get to

examples: There is something missing in my jewelry box!
The child had been missing for a week

meanings.definition: not caught with the senses or the mind
